prompt: Digital advertising banner, 1:1 square format, ultra-clean product advertisement. BACKGROUND: Vivid royal blue gradient filling entire canvas — deep navy blue #0D2660 at top 30%, transitions to vibrant royal blue #1A52B3 in center, slightly lighter cobalt #2060CC at bottom 30%. Smooth radial vignette, darkest at corners. HEADER ZONE (top 0% to 18%): Centered at top 3%, small 'Immunotec' logotype text in semi-transparent white #FFFFFF at 70% opacity, clean sans-serif font, 22px size. Below at 7%, massive ultra-bold white text 'IMMUNOCAL' in condensed impact-style uppercase font, letter-spacing -2px, font-size equivalent to 14% canvas height, pure white #FFFFFF, slight italic lean, strong text shadow. Below at 14%, even larger ultra-bold white text 'PLATINUM' in same condensed impact font, font-size equivalent to 16% canvas height, pure white #FFFFFF with subtle gold tint #F5E6A0 mixed, text shadow. PRODUCT ZONE (18% to 65% from top): COMPLETELY EMPTY — deep royal blue background with warm golden radial glow #D4AF37 at 40% opacity centered at 50% horizontal, 42% vertical, glow radius spans 35% of canvas. NO OBJECTS in this zone. Below product at 64%, centered small italic white text 'Disponible en: Immunotec' in clean sans-serif, 18px, white #FFFFFF. BENEFIT PILLS ZONE (67% to 87% from top): Three side-by-side rounded rectangle pill buttons, each 30% wide, 16% tall, horizontal gap 1.5% between them, centered horizontally. Pills background: dark navy #0E2150 with slight blue gradient overlay. Pill borders: 1.5px solid #2A6FD4. Each pill contains centered white bold text in 2 lines, 16px, clean sans-serif: LEFT PILL text 'Alivia el dolor crónico desde la raíz.' CENTER PILL text 'Reduce inflamación articular y muscular.' RIGHT PILL text 'Regenera y fortalece las articulaciones.' BOTTOM TAGLINE (88% to 95%): Centered bold uppercase dark text '#0D2660' on white background band spanning full width, text 'PRECURSOR DE GLUTATIÓN CON CMP™ Y RMF EXCLUSIVOS', clean bold sans-serif 18px. Overall style: premium pharmaceutical supplement advertisement, clean and professional, vibrant blue palette, strong typographic hierarchy.
negative_prompt: product images, bottles, sachets, boxes, supplements, pills, capsules, any physical objects, people, faces, hands, cluttered design, text errors, misspellings, decorative flourishes, gradients on text, drop shadows on pills, yellow background, green, red, orange colors, low quality, blurry, pixelated, watermark
